name: BEAVRS Full Core
description: MIT BEAVRS PWR benchmark, full 193-assembly core (Cycle 1, 975 ppm boron, HFP 600K). Westinghouse 4-loop, 17x17 lattices. Continuous-energy eigenvalue deck.

name: 17x17 PWR Assembly
description: Westinghouse-style 17x17 PWR assembly (264 fuel pins, 24 guide tubes, 1 instrument tube). Physically sane geometry/materials for visualization; kcode block is nominal.

name: 17x17 PWR Assembly
description: Westinghouse-style 17x17 PWR assembly for Serpent. Physically sane geometry/materials for visualization; settings are nominal.

name: 17x17 PWR Assembly
description: Westinghouse-style 17x17 PWR assembly for OpenMC (Python). Built from OWEN's omc_assembly_script snippet; modern OpenMC API. Starter/visualization deck, not a validated benchmark.

name: BEAVRS Core
description: BEAVRS-style PWR core layout for MCNP. Physically sane geometry/materials for visualization; not a converged/validated benchmark.

name: BEAVRS Core
description: BEAVRS-style PWR core layout for Serpent. Physically sane geometry/materials for visualization; not a converged/validated benchmark.
